mapper.select: SELECT USER_NO AS userNo, USER_NAME AS userName, EMAIL AS email, PHONE AS phone, PROVIDER AS provider, AUTH AS auth FROM USERS WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND NVL(STATUS, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE' AND DELETE_AT IS NULL
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USERS_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO USERS ( USER_NO, USER_NAME, PROVIDER, CREATED_AT, STATUS, AUTH ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{userName}, 'LOCAL', SYSDATE, 'ACTIVE', 2 )
